libs-calibration.title: FIRST LIGHT
libs-calibration.description: ChemCam spectrometer powered on. Signal noisy — calibration sequence initiated.

libs-calibration.title: BASELINE ACQUIRED
libs-calibration.description: Background emission characterized. Strongest emission lines now resolvable.

libs-calibration.title: PARTIAL SPECTRUM
libs-calibration.description: Wavelength calibration improving. Major elements identifiable — minor peaks still uncertain.

libs-calibration.title: HIGH RESOLUTION
libs-calibration.description: Spectrometer approaching full calibration. Trace element detection coming online.

libs-calibration.title: FULL LIBS CAPABILITY
libs-calibration.description: Spectrometer fully calibrated. All emission lines resolved — maximum scientific yield.

dan-prospecting.title: HYDROGEN TRACE
dan-prospecting.description: DAN detected a subsurface hydrogen anomaly. Neutron albedo shift confirmed — something is down there.

dan-prospecting.title: FIRST PROSPECT
dan-prospecting.description: Neutron survey complete. Subsurface composition analyzed — drill site assessment pending.

dan-prospecting.title: WATER ON MARS
dan-prospecting.description: Subsurface ice deposit confirmed. Drill marker placed — extraction hardware will follow.

sam-analysis.title: FIRST ANALYSIS
sam-analysis.description: SAM's first experiment complete. The lab is operational.

sam-analysis.title: NOTABLE FINDING
sam-analysis.description: An uncommon discovery — the data is getting interesting.

sam-analysis.title: RARE SPECIMEN
sam-analysis.description: A rare discovery. Mission Control will want to see this.

sam-analysis.title: BREAKTHROUGH
sam-analysis.description: A legendary discovery. This changes everything we know about Mars.

sam-analysis.title: TRIPLE ANALYSIS
sam-analysis.description: All three SAM modes run on a single rock type. Maximum scientific yield.

mars-survival.title: FIRST SOL
mars-survival.description: One full Martian day and night cycle completed. Mission clock still running.

mars-survival.title: FIVE SOLS
mars-survival.description: Five sols on the surface. Radiation and cold logged — crew still operational.

mars-survival.title: TEN SOLS
mars-survival.description: Double-digit sols. Long-baseline environmental data accumulating.

mars-survival.title: FIFTY SOLS
mars-survival.description: Extended surface campaign. Mission endurance exceeds many design studies.

mars-survival.title: HUNDRED SOLS
mars-survival.description: Century sol on Mars. Sustained science operations — a landmark in surface survival.

reward-track.title: SWIFT WHEELS
reward-track.description: Your driving algorithms are optimizing. Paths feel smoother.

reward-track.title: KEEN EYE
reward-track.description: Pattern recognition improving. Instruments read faster.

reward-track.title: POWER NAP
reward-track.description: Firmware update — idle draw reduced across all subsystems.

reward-track.title: SECOND WIND
reward-track.description: When battery drops below 15%, RTG output boosts +20% for 5 minutes. Once per sol.

reward-track.title: THICK SKIN
reward-track.description: Thermal insulation settling in. Heat loss reduced.

reward-track.title: DATA YIELD
reward-track.description: Mission Control values your data more. Each discovery pays better.

reward-track.title: PACK RAT
reward-track.description: You figured out how to wedge samples into that gap behind the RTG.

reward-track.title: NIGHT VISION
reward-track.description: Night movement speed penalty reduced from 50% to 35%. Your nav cameras adapted to low light.

reward-track.title: STEADY HAND
reward-track.description: Calibration drift corrected. Anomaly detection sharpened.

reward-track.title: QUICK FIX
reward-track.description: You've repaired enough to know the shortcuts.

reward-track.title: CRUISE CONTROL
reward-track.description: Wheel motor timing optimized. Smoother acceleration curves.

reward-track.title: LAB EFFICIENCY
reward-track.description: SAM protocols streamlined. Less wasted processing time.

reward-track.title: DUST SHAKER
reward-track.description: Solar panel dust accumulation rate halved. Automatic vibration cleaning every dawn.

reward-track.title: GRID SENSE
reward-track.description: You feel the power budget instinctively. Waste eliminated.

reward-track.title: ECHO SCAN
reward-track.description: DAN leaves a faint persistent heatmap trail on the terrain even when deactivated.

reward-track.title: WARM BLOOD
reward-track.description: Thermal management is second nature. The cold bothers you less.

reward-track.title: PROSPECT EYE
reward-track.description: You know what Mission Control wants before they ask.

reward-track.title: OVERCLOCK
reward-track.description: Once per sol, run any instrument at double speed for 60 seconds. Costs 50% extra power during the burst.

reward-track.title: IRON TREADS
reward-track.description: Wheel wear patterns mapped. Micro-adjustments per revolution.

reward-track.title: DEEP READER
reward-track.description: You're reading spectrographs before the software finishes rendering.

reward-track.title: STORM RIDER
reward-track.description: During dust storms, movement penalty reduced by 50%. You've learned to drive blind.

reward-track.title: LEAN MACHINE
reward-track.description: Every unnecessary process killed. The rover runs clean.

reward-track.title: FURNACE HEART
reward-track.description: RTG waste heat routing optimized. Free warmth.

reward-track.title: MULTI-SCAN
reward-track.description: MastCam now tags rocks with predicted best instrument based on visual profile.

reward-track.title: SHARP NOSE
reward-track.description: Spectrograph noise floor reduced. Faintest signals now detectable.

reward-track.title: BULK ANALYSIS
reward-track.description: SAM can queue 2 samples back-to-back without exiting the overlay. Second sample runs at 75% power cost.

reward-track.title: MARATHON WHEELS
reward-track.description: 800 SP worth of terrain under your treads. The rover knows Mars.

reward-track.title: REFLEX SCAN
reward-track.description: Instrument warmup eliminated. Point and fire.

reward-track.title: SOLAR SURPLUS
reward-track.description: During peak solar, generation +15%. Your panels track the sun with optimized gimbal angles.

reward-track.title: WHISPER DRAW
reward-track.description: The rover hums. Barely. Every electron accounted for.

reward-track.title: POLAR BLOOD
reward-track.description: You could overwinter at the pole. The cold is just weather now.

reward-track.title: GHOST TRACKS
reward-track.description: Your wheel tracks glow faintly on the minimap. Complete terrain coverage visualization.

reward-track.title: LEGEND'S YIELD
reward-track.description: Your name is on papers. Every data point you send gets cited.

reward-track.title: FULL AUTONOMY
reward-track.description: Mission Control goes quiet. No more directives — you choose what to explore, what to analyze, what to build. Mars is yours.
